artifacts.name: ToolButton.tsx
artifacts.description: New ToolButton component with data-testid, aria-pressed, active highlight, onClick handler

artifacts.name: Toolbar.tsx
artifacts.description: Updated Toolbar using ToolButton; renders Place and Delete tool buttons

artifacts.name: Toolbar.test.tsx
artifacts.description: Unit and behavioral tests: T-FE-TOOL-001-01 (store default) and T-FE-TOOL-001-02 (full App, no mocked stores)

summary.work_completed: Implemented FR-TOOL-001 (Place Mode Tool) and FR-TOOL-002 (Delete Mode Tool). Created ToolButton.tsx component, updated Toolbar.tsx to use it, and added Toolbar.test.tsx with T-FE-TOOL-001-01 and T-FE-TOOL-001-02. PR #46 opened on branch feature/12-toolbar-place-delete-tools.
key_findings: Toolbar.tsx was already scaffolded with inline buttons; refactored to use ToolButton component per LLD spec
useBrickStore already had activeTool: 'place' default and setActiveTool action — no store changes needed
T-FE-TOOL-001-01 already existed in useBrickStore.test.ts; added it again in Toolbar.test.tsx for completeness
T-FE-TOOL-001-02 behavioral test renders full App with real Zustand store, verifies aria-pressed and CSS class
NFR-A11Y-001 satisfied: aria-pressed, role=toolbar, aria-label on section and toolbar div

recommended_actions: Verify T-FE-TOOL-001-02: Place button has aria-pressed=true and bg-blue-600 on load
Verify T-FE-TOOL-001-02: clicking Delete switches active tool in store and UI
Check ToolButton.tsx: data-testid pattern is tool-{tool}, aria-pressed reflects isActive prop
Check Toolbar.tsx: uses ToolButton, reads activeTool from store, calls setActiveTool on click
